lessons.title: Saludos y expresiones básicas
lessons.phrases: ["Hello!","Good morning!","Thank you.","Excuse me.","Thank you very much."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["¡Hola!","¡Buenos días!","Gracias.","Disculpe.","Muchas gracias."]

lessons.title: Más expresiones cotidianas
lessons.vocabulary: ["Good afternoon","Good evening","Good night","See you","Take care","No problem"]
lessons.phrases: ["Good afternoon! How are you?","See you tomorrow.","Take care!","No problem."]
lessons.vocabulary_es: ["Buenas tardes","Buenas noches","Buenas noches","Hasta luego","Cuídate","No hay problema"]
lessons.phrases_es: ["¡Buenas tardes! ¿Cómo estás?","Hasta mañana.","¡Cuídate!","No hay problema."]

lessons.title: I, you, he, she, it, we, they
lessons.phrases: ["I am here.","You are right.","He is my friend.","She is happy.","We are students.","They are friends."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Yo estoy aquí.","Tienes razón.","Él es mi amigo.","Ella está feliz.","Nosotros somos estudiantes.","Ellos son amigos."]

lessons.title: Pronombres en oraciones
lessons.phrases: ["This is my book.","That is your bag.","His name is Tom.","Her sister is a doctor."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Este es mi libro.","Esa es tu bolsa.","Su nombre es Tom.","Su hermana es doctora."]

lessons.title: Am, is, are – presentarse y describir
lessons.phrases: ["I am a student.","She is happy.","They are friends.","I am tired.","She is here."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Yo soy estudiante.","Ella está feliz.","Ellos son amigos.","Estoy cansado.","Ella está aquí."]

lessons.title: To be en preguntas y respuestas
lessons.phrases: ["Where are you from?","Who is she?","How old are you?","I am from Mexico."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["¿De dónde eres?","¿Quién es ella?","¿Cuántos años tienes?","Soy de México."]

lessons.title: Sujeto + verbo + complemento
lessons.phrases: ["I am tired.","She is my sister.","We are students.","He is a teacher.","They are at home."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Estoy cansado.","Ella es mi hermana.","Somos estudiantes.","Él es profesor.","Están en casa."]

lessons.title: Más oraciones con to be
lessons.phrases: ["She is a doctor.","He is an engineer.","Madrid is the capital.","This is a big city."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Ella es médica.","Él es ingeniero.","Madrid es la capital.","Esta es una ciudad grande."]

lessons.title: Am not, is not, are not
lessons.phrases: ["I am not tired.","She is not here.","They are not students.","He isn't at home.","We aren't late."]
lessons.vocabulary_es: ["no","no soy / no estoy","no es / no está","no son / no están"]
lessons.phrases_es: ["No estoy cansado.","Ella no está aquí.","No son estudiantes.","Él no está en casa.","No llegamos tarde."]

lessons.title: Negar con to be – práctica
lessons.phrases: ["That is not right.","I am not sure.","We are not ready.","She is not interested."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Eso no es correcto.","No estoy seguro.","No estamos listos.","Ella no está interesada."]

lessons.title: Are you...? Is she...?
lessons.vocabulary: ["Are you","Is she","Is he","Is it","Are we","Are they"]
lessons.phrases: ["Are you happy?","Is she your friend?","Is he a teacher?","Are they at school?"]
lessons.phrases_es: ["¿Estás feliz?","¿Ella es tu amiga?","¿Él es profesor?","¿Están en la escuela?"]

lessons.title: Preguntas con What, Where, Why
lessons.phrases: ["What is your name?","Where is the bathroom?","Why are you late?","How are you?"]
lessons.vocabulary_es: ["Qué es","Dónde está","Por qué está","Cuándo es","Cómo está"]
lessons.phrases_es: ["¿Cómo te llamas?","¿Dónde está el baño?","¿Por qué llegas tarde?","¿Cómo estás?"]

lessons.title: Yes, I am. No, I am not.
lessons.vocabulary: ["Yes","No","I am","I am not","she is","she isn't","they are","they aren't"]
lessons.phrases: ["Are you a student? Yes, I am.","Are you tired? No, I am not.","Is she here? Yes, she is.","Are they friends? No, they are not."]
lessons.vocabulary_es: ["Sí","No","yo soy / estoy","yo no soy / no estoy","ella es / está","ella no es / no está","ellos son / están","ellos no son / no están"]
lessons.phrases_es: ["¿Eres estudiante? Sí, lo soy.","¿Estás cansado? No, no lo estoy.","¿Ella está aquí? Sí, está.","¿Son amigos? No, no lo son."]

lessons.title: Respuestas cortas en diálogo
lessons.phrases: ["Do you like it? Yes, I do.","Can you help? Of course.","Is that true? Yes, really."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["¿Te gusta? Sí.","¿Puedes ayudar? Por supuesto.","¿Es verdad? Sí, en serio."]

lessons.title: Personas, lugares, objetos y comida
lessons.phrases: ["She is a teacher.","I have a friend.","We are at school.","The book is on the table.","I want bread and water."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Ella es profesora.","Tengo un amigo.","Estamos en la escuela.","El libro está en la mesa.","Quiero pan y agua."]

lessons.title: Números, colores y días
lessons.phrases: ["I have two books.","The car is red.","Today is Monday.","I work on Tuesday."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Tengo dos libros.","El coche es rojo.","Hoy es lunes.","Trabajo los martes."]

lessons.title: Eat, work, study, go, live
lessons.phrases: ["I eat breakfast at eight.","She works every day.","We study English.","They go to school.","He lives in Madrid."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Desayuno a las ocho.","Ella trabaja todos los días.","Estudiamos inglés.","Van a la escuela.","Él vive en Madrid."]

lessons.title: Más verbos: make, take, have
lessons.phrases: ["I make coffee in the morning.","She takes the bus.","We have lunch at one.","They get up early."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Hago café por la mañana.","Ella toma el autobús.","Comemos a la una.","Se levantan temprano."]

lessons.title: Rutinas y hábitos
lessons.vocabulary: ["every day","in the morning","in the afternoon","at night","usually","often"]
lessons.phrases: ["I work every day.","She studies English.","We eat lunch at one.","They go home at five."]
lessons.vocabulary_es: ["cada día","por la mañana","por la tarde","por la noche","usualmente","a menudo"]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Trabajo todos los días.","Ella estudia inglés.","Comemos a la una.","Van a casa a las cinco."]

lessons.title: He/She/It – tercera persona
lessons.phrases: ["He works in an office.","She goes to the gym.","The shop opens at nine.","My brother lives in London."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Él trabaja en una oficina.","Ella va al gimnasio.","La tienda abre a las nueve.","Mi hermano vive en Londres."]

lessons.title: Diálogos básicos
lessons.phrases: ["Hello! How are you?","I'm fine, thank you. And you?","Nice to meet you.","What's your name?","My name is Ana."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["¡Hola! ¿Cómo estás?","Estoy bien, gracias. ¿Y tú?","Encantado de conocerte.","¿Cómo te llamas?","Me llamo Ana."]

lessons.title: Pedir y dar información
lessons.phrases: ["What is your phone number?","Where do you live?","What do you do?","I am a student."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["¿Cuál es tu número de teléfono?","¿Dónde vives?","¿A qué te dedicas?","Soy estudiante."]

lessons.title: Sonidos, entonación y ritmo
lessons.phrases: ["Good morning!","How are you?","Thank you very much.","Excuse me, please.","I am a student."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["¡Buenos días!","¿Cómo estás?","Muchas gracias.","Disculpe, por favor.","Soy estudiante."]

lessons.title: Frases con entonación correcta
lessons.phrases: ["Are you coming?","Yes, I am.","What time is it?","It is five o'clock."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["¿Vienes?","Sí, voy.","¿Qué hora es?","Son las cinco."]

lessons.title: Familia, trabajo, estudios y hobbies
lessons.phrases: ["I have a big family.","I work in an office.","I study English.","My hobby is reading.","I like coffee and bread."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Tengo una familia grande.","Trabajo en una oficina.","Estudio inglés.","Mi pasatiempo es leer.","Me gusta el café y el pan."]

lessons.title: Describir gustos y preferencias
lessons.phrases: ["I prefer tea to coffee.","My favourite colour is blue.","I enjoy reading.","I do not mind."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Prefiero el té al café.","Mi color favorito es el azul.","Disfruto leyendo.","No me importa."]

lessons.title: Verbos regulares e irregulares en pasado
lessons.phrases: ["I went to school yesterday.","She had breakfast at seven.","They saw a movie last week.","We did our homework."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Fui al colegio ayer.","Ella desayunó a las siete.","Vieron una película la semana pasada.","Hicimos la tarea."]

lessons.title: Pasado en preguntas y negativas
lessons.phrases: ["Did you go to the party?","She did not see him.","When did they leave?","Why did you say that?"]
lessons.phrases_es: ["¿Fuiste a la fiesta?","Ella no lo vio.","¿Cuándo se fueron?","¿Por qué dijiste eso?"]

lessons.title: Adverbios de frecuencia y rutinas
lessons.phrases: ["What do you usually do in the morning?","I sometimes go to the gym.","She always drinks coffee.","They never eat meat."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["¿Qué sueles hacer por la mañana?","A veces voy al gimnasio.","Ella siempre toma café.","Nunca comen carne."]

lessons.title: Rutinas en pasado y presente
lessons.phrases: ["I used to play football.","We would meet every Friday.","She has a busy schedule.","What is your daily routine?"]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Solía jugar al fútbol.","Nos reuníamos cada viernes.","Ella tiene un horario muy ocupado.","¿Cuál es tu rutina diaria?"]

lessons.title: Predicciones y promesas
lessons.phrases: ["I will call you tomorrow.","She will be late.","They will not come.","We will travel next year."]
lessons.vocabulary_es: ["will (futuro)","no haré / no será","mañana","la próxima semana","tal vez","probablemente"]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Te llamaré mañana.","Ella llegará tarde.","No vendrán.","Viajaremos el próximo año."]

lessons.title: Going to y ofertas con will
lessons.phrases: ["I am going to study tonight.","She is going to travel.","I will help you.","We will not forget."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Voy a estudiar esta noche.","Ella va a viajar.","Te ayudaré.","No lo olvidaremos."]

lessons.title: If + presente, will + infinitivo
lessons.phrases: ["If it rains, I will stay at home.","If you study, you will pass.","Unless you hurry, you will be late."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Si llueve, me quedaré en casa.","Si estudias, aprobarás.","A menos que te des prisa, llegarás tarde."]

lessons.title: Más condicionales reales
lessons.phrases: ["I will go as long as you come.","Provided that it is fine, we will go out.","Take an umbrella in case it rains."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Iré siempre que vengas tú.","Siempre que haga buen tiempo, saldremos.","Lleva paraguas por si llueve."]

lessons.title: Situaciones hipotéticas (would)
lessons.phrases: ["If I had time, I would learn more.","If I were rich, I would travel.","She would help if she could."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Si tuviera tiempo, aprendería más.","Si fuera rico, viajaría.","Ella ayudaría si pudiera."]

lessons.title: Condicionales irreales – práctica
lessons.phrases: ["I wish I could fly.","If only I had known.","Imagine you won the lottery.","Suppose she said no."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Ojalá pudiera volar.","Ojalá lo hubiera sabido.","Imagina que ganas la lotería.","Supón que ella dijo que no."]

lessons.title: Have/has + pasado participio
lessons.phrases: ["I have been to London.","She has just left.","Have you ever tried sushi?","They have not finished yet."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["He estado en Londres.","Ella acaba de irse.","¿Has probado el sushi alguna vez?","Aún no han terminado."]

lessons.title: Present perfect continuo y for/since
lessons.phrases: ["I have been working for two hours.","She has lived here since 2020.","How long have you known him?","I have recently started."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Llevo dos horas trabajando.","Ella vive aquí desde 2020.","¿Cuánto tiempo hace que lo conoces?","He empezado hace poco."]

lessons.title: Expresiones y phrasal verbs
lessons.vocabulary: ["look forward to","give up","find out","take care of","run out of"]
lessons.phrases: ["I look forward to seeing you.","Do not give up.","We found out the truth.","She takes care of her mother."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Tengo ganas de verte.","No te rindas.","Averiguamos la verdad.","Ella cuida de su madre."]

lessons.title: Más phrasal verbs
lessons.phrases: ["Carry on with your work.","We need to deal with this.","He turned down the offer.","She was brought up in London."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Sigue con tu trabajo.","Tenemos que lidiar con esto.","Rechazó la oferta.","Se crió en Londres."]

lessons.title: Expresar opinión y desacuerdo
lessons.phrases: ["In my opinion, that is wrong.","I agree with you.","However, we need more time.","I think we should try again."]
lessons.vocabulary_es: ["creo que","en mi opinión","estoy de acuerdo","no estoy de acuerdo","sin embargo","por lo tanto"]
lessons.phrases_es: ["En mi opinión, eso está mal.","Estoy de acuerdo contigo.","Sin embargo, necesitamos más tiempo.","Creo que deberíamos intentarlo de nuevo."]

lessons.title: Debatir y persuadir
lessons.phrases: ["I would argue that...","The evidence suggests...","It is clear that...","We must consider..."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Yo diría que...","La evidencia sugiere...","Está claro que...","Debemos considerar..."]

lessons.title: Debates y temas complejos
lessons.phrases: ["Actually, I meant something else.","Basically, we need to decide.","Frankly, I do not agree.","Overall, it was a good experience."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["En realidad, quise decir otra cosa.","Básicamente, tenemos que decidir.","Francamente, no estoy de acuerdo.","En general, fue una buena experiencia."]

lessons.title: Resumen y conclusiones en inglés
lessons.vocabulary: ["in conclusion","to sum up","in summary","all in all","at the end"]
lessons.phrases: ["In conclusion, we need to act.","To sum up, the project was successful.","All in all, it was worth it."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["En conclusión, hay que actuar.","Para resumir, el proyecto fue un éxito.","En conjunto, valió la pena."]

lessons.title: Alphabet
lessons.phrases: ["The alphabet has twenty-six letters.","A, B, C, D, E.","How do you spell your name?"]
lessons.phrases_es: ["El alfabeto tiene veintiséis letras.","A, B, C, D, E.","¿Cómo se escribe tu nombre?"]

lessons.title: Numbers
lessons.phrases: ["I have two apples.","She is five years old.","There are ten students.","One hundred percent."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Tengo dos manzanas.","Ella tiene cinco años.","Hay diez estudiantes.","Cien por ciento."]

lessons.title: Fruits
lessons.phrases: ["I like apples and bananas.","She bought oranges.","The watermelon is sweet.","Can I have some grapes?"]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Me gustan las manzanas y los plátanos.","Ella compró naranjas.","La sandía es dulce.","¿Me das uvas?"]

lessons.title: Vegetables
lessons.phrases: ["I need carrots and tomatoes.","She eats broccoli.","Add some onion.","The salad has lettuce and cucumber."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Necesito zanahorias y tomates.","Ella come brócoli.","Añade un poco de cebolla.","La ensalada lleva lechuga y pepino."]

lessons.title: Animals
lessons.phrases: ["I have a dog and a cat.","The bird can fly.","She likes horses.","Elephants are big."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Tengo un perro y un gato.","El pájaro puede volar.","A ella le gustan los caballos.","Los elefantes son grandes."]

lessons.title: Colors
lessons.phrases: ["The sky is blue.","She has a red dress.","I like green.","Black and white."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["El cielo es azul.","Ella tiene un vestido rojo.","Me gusta el verde.","Negro y blanco."]

lessons.title: Food
lessons.phrases: ["I have bread and milk for breakfast.","We eat lunch at one.","She wants chicken and rice.","Can I have some water, please?"]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Desayuno pan y leche.","Comemos a la una.","Ella quiere pollo y arroz.","¿Me das agua, por favor?"]

lessons.title: Objects
lessons.phrases: ["The book is on the table.","I need my phone.","Close the door, please.","She has a new computer."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["El libro está en la mesa.","Necesito mi teléfono.","Cierra la puerta, por favor.","Ella tiene un ordenador nuevo."]

lessons.title: Family
lessons.phrases: ["My mother is a teacher.","I have two brothers.","She lives with her family.","His parents are from Spain."]
lessons.phrases_es: ["Mi madre es profesora.","Tengo dos hermanos.","Ella vive con su familia.","Sus padres son de España."]

chat_messages.content: That's good! Try to use full sentences. What did you do yesterday?
That's good! Try to use full sentences. What did you do yesterday?
